title: T-002 — prod_detail table + indexes (NPD-a core schema)
prompt:
# T-002 — prod_detail table + indexes

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create prod_detail table for multi-component ProdDetail rows (1 per component for multi-comp FAs; mirror row for single-comp).

## Implementation contract
Emit Drizzle migration 0011_prod_detail.sql per §4.3 DDL: id UUID PK, product_code FK references product(product_code) ON DELETE CASCADE, tenant_id UUID, intermediate_code TEXT, component_index INT, manufacturing_operation_1..4 TEXT, operation_yield_1..4 NUMERIC, line TEXT, equipment_setup TEXT, yield_line, resource_requirement, rate, intermediate_code_p1..p4 (auto), intermediate_code_final, slice_count, component_weight, created_at. Indexes: (product_code), (tenant_id, product_code). Enable RLS with tenant_id policy. Drizzle ORM schema in packages/db/src/schema/prod-detail.ts.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0011_prod_detail.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/prod-detail.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/prod-detail.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0011 ran, when describing prod_detail, then both indexes exist and FK product_code → product enforces ON DELETE CASCADE
2. Given a product row deleted, when DELETE cascades, then all prod_detail rows for that product_code are removed
3. Given two tenants with rows, when querying prod_detail under tenant A session, then no tenant B rows appear

## Test strategy
- RED: tests asserting cascade delete + RLS isolation
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test prod-detail'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow component_index to be NULL
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not omit FK CASCADE

pipeline_inputs.description: Create prod_detail table for per-component manufacturing data with FK to product + RLS + Drizzle schema.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0011 emits prod_detail per §4.3 DDL with cascade delete on product. Drizzle schema exports types. Tests verify cascade and RLS isolation between tenants.
out_of_scope: Do not implement cascade engine logic
Do not seed test data beyond test fixtures

Given a product row deleted, when DELETE cascades, then all prod_detail rows for that product_code are removed
